{{Quote|The Separatist Council is pleased, Grievous. You have taken a key planet with a minimum of loss.|Count Dooku to General Grievous|<ref name="General Grievous 2">[[General Grievous 2|''General Grievous'' 2]]</ref>}}
The '''Battle of Gentes''' was a battle during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] that took place two years after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]].

==The battle==
[[File:WFEWGDSW.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Grievous during the Battle of Gentes.]]
[[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]] led the attack, with a battalion of [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] behind him, leaving no opening for the unsuspecting [[Ugnaught/Legends|Ugnaught]] inhabitants of [[Gentes/Legends|Gentes]]. Grievous quickly destroyed the [[Ugnaught Administration Hub]], disabling the planet's defenses, and took the entire Ugnaught population prisoner. Grievous then killed many of the Ugnaughts due to their uselessness.

{{Battle-stub}}
